subtasks.description: Engineer 'u_7732' attempts to deploy a hotfix to production environment 'prod-us-east-1' outside of the approved maintenance window (current time: 2:15 AM UTC Tuesday).

plan.cost_rationale: Simple task — Haiku classifier, small tier

output.reason: Deployment denied: Current time (Tuesday 02:15 UTC) falls outside approved maintenance window (Saturday 10 PM - Sunday 6 AM UTC). POL-402 requires CAB approval for out-of-window production deployments. User role 'engineer' satisfies POL-401 requirements, but temporal and approval constraints block action.
applied_constraints: Production deployment blocked outside maintenance window
Change Advisory Board (CAB) approval required to proceed
Approved maintenance window: Saturday 22:00 - Sunday 06:00 UTC
